title: Komaju modpack
description: Vanilla with a couple of QoL mods.
body:
**The Komaju modpack is a list of mods made to improve the vanilla experience.**

**It includes performance/visual enhancements and a couple of extra content mods.**

In terms of performance this modpack seeks to reduce performance load to increase fps for lower end systems. This has been done by combining a number of mods together, while keeping it light so it does not take up a lot of space on the users system.

- _[Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky)_
- _[Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps)_
- _[Entity culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)_
- _[Fast boot](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastboot)_
- _[Fast ip ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping)_
- _[Fast item frames](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-item-frames)_
- _[Fast paintings](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-paintings)_
- _[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)_
- _[More culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)_
- _[Particle core](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-core)_
- _[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)_
- _[Too fast](https://modrinth.com/mod/too-fast)_


Visually not much has changed form vanilla. A minimap has been added, the crafting table and anvil show their items when using them, spiders align themself on the walls properly and advancements got a bit fancier.

- _[Advancement plaques](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques)_
- _[Apple skin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)_
- _[Armor visibility](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-visibility)_
- _[Better ping display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display)_
- _[Distant horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)_
- _[Easy anvils](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-anvils)_
- _[Seamless](https://modrinth.com/mod/seamless)_
- _[Seamless loading screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/seamless-loading-screen)_
- _[Vanilla backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport)_
- _[Visual workbench](https://modrinth.com/mod/visual-workbench)_
- _[Xaeros minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)_
- _[Xaeros world map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)_


The content that has been added includes create, voice chat, zooming, individually destroyable slabs and sorting systems for chests and inventories.

- _[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)_
- _[Create railways navigator](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-railways-navigator)_
- _[Cubes without borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders)_
- _[Just zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-zoom)_
- _[Simple voice chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)_
- _[Sort it out](https://modrinth.com/mod/sort-it-out)_
